error: TimeoutError: Waiting for selector '#loading-spinner' to be hidden
diagnosis: Page has infinite loading state or spinner never disappears
fix: Check if the API call is failing. Add error handling: await Promise.race([page.waitForSelector('#loading-spinner', {state: 'hidden'}), page.waitForSelector('.error-message')])

diagnosis: Dropdown menu only appears after clicking trigger element
fix: Click the dropdown trigger first: await page.click('.dropdown-toggle'); await page.click('.dropdown-menu .option')

error: Error: strict mode violation: locator resolved to 3 elements
diagnosis: Multiple submit buttons on page, selector is ambiguous
fix: Make selector more specific using parent context: await page.click('form#login-form button.submit') or use nth: await page.click('button.submit >> nth=0')

diagnosis: Link opens new tab/window, original page context is lost
fix: Use popup handling: const [popup] = await Promise.all([page.waitForEvent('popup'), page.click('a.external-link')]); await popup.waitForLoadState()

error: Error: Element is outside of the viewport
diagnosis: Element exists but is not scrolled into view
fix: Scroll element into view first: await page.locator('#footer-link').scrollIntoViewIfNeeded(); await page.click('#footer-link')

error: TimeoutError: locator.click: Element detached from DOM
diagnosis: A rerender replaced the button after validation, so the original handle became stale
fix: Re-locate right before click and wait for stable state: await page.locator('[data-testid="save-profile"]').waitFor({ state: 'visible' }); await page.locator('[data-testid="save-profile"]').click();

error: AssertionError: expected status badge to contain 'Published'
diagnosis: Background publish job is asynchronous and UI was asserted before completion
fix: Poll for final state with bounded retry: await expect.poll(async () => page.locator('.status-badge').textContent(), { timeout: 8000 }).toContain('Published');

diagnosis: Page keeps background requests alive, so networkidle never settles
fix: Wait for a concrete UI signal instead of networkidle: await page.goto('/reports'); await expect(page.locator('[data-testid="reports-list"]')).toBeVisible();

diagnosis: Success toast appears after a debounce and may be removed by rerender
fix: Wait on the toast locator with a bounded timeout and assert text after it appears: await expect(page.locator('[data-testid="toast"]')).toContainText('Saved', { timeout: 5000 });

diagnosis: The modal is only rendered after clicking the open button, so the test is waiting on the wrong step
fix: Click the trigger first, then wait for the modal: await page.click('[data-testid="open-modal"]'); await expect(page.locator('.modal')).toBeVisible();
